verdict_reason: Tags (knowledge-action-integration, team-state, on-call-doctrine) are doctrinally coherent and distinct from the deprecation-management cluster around 2.26-2.28-2.30. The on-call-doctrine tag anchors the verse specifically to the operator's tacit-knowledge thread of the chapter. No subtle drift; the cross-reference from 2.28's counter_example (forwarding the undocumented-tribal-knowledge case here) is load-bearing.
